Video.summary: It’s another reveal day! Mark and Allysa install the graphics on the ’71 Plumb Crazy Challenger and the 1970 Lemon-Twist Roadrunner is finished and readied to be delivered to it’s owner. And Mark proposes - what he thinks is - a “brilliant” idea to the producers of the show.
Video.title: Roadrunner With a Twist

Video.summary: With our 1970 Plum Crazy Challenger nearing completion, works shifts to our 1970 Tribute Superbird while Mark and Cousin Dougie build out a 340 engine and Will assists with metal work with George to help him stay on schedule.
Video.title: Engines, Assemblies, and Dougie, Oh My!

Image.alt: Engines, Assemblies, and Dougie, Oh My!
Engines, Assemblies, and Dougie, Oh My!
Engines, Assemblies, and Dougie, Oh My!

Video.summary: It’s a special day at Graveyard Carz. The 1970 Plum Crazy Challenger that has been part of our show since its inception is finally finished and ready to be shipped to it’s new owner. But before they do that, they take it to the coast to show it off at Chinook Winds Casino Resort Car Show!
Video.title: I Love the Smell of Plum Crazy in the Morning

Image.alt: I Love the Smell of Plum Crazy in the Morning
I Love the Smell of Plum Crazy in the Morning
I Love the Smell of Plum Crazy in the Morning

Video.summary: Stress is high at the shop and things don’t get any better when Mark finds out that Tony from Tony’s Mopar Parts has secretly flown out to check in on the progress of his 1970 Challenger. Knowing that the restoration hasn’t started, Mark does everything in his power to distract Tony while Cousin Dougie races to disassemble his car.
Video.title: Mopardy

Video.summary: SEMA 2017 is fast approaching and the Graveyard Ghouls are working hard on Chris Jacob’s 1969 GTX and John Buck’s 1971 Challenger with a Hellcrate Hemi. But as pressure begins to mount, Mark questions if he’ll be able to keep his promised - and ultimately - is forced to make a difficult decision.
Video.title: A Buck Shorted

Video.summary: The Phoenix Cuda: A legendary Mopar which was incinerated and from the ashes, will be reborn at Graveyard Carz.
Video.title: The Phoenix 'Cuda

Video.summary: Graveyard Carz returns to conclude the epic builds of Chris Jacob’s 1968 GTX after it suffered a devastating fire, and the first of its kind 1970 Plymouth Superbird equipped with a Hellcat Crate Hemi.
Video.title: SEMA Has Eyes On A Hellbird

Image.alt: SEMA Has Eyes On A Hellbird
SEMA Has Eyes On A Hellbird
SEMA Has Eyes On A Hellbird

Video.summary: New Season, New Carz! With SEMA in their rear-view mirror, the ghouls begin the final assembly of a 1969 Plymouth GTX in Seafoam Turquoise. And when help comes up short-handed, Mark enlists what he likes to call his “Echo Bomber.”
Video.title: 68 GTX vs Echo Bomber

Video.summary: It’s the 100th Episode! Join Mark and Royal and watch the never-before-aired Pilot featuring some of the first Mopar restorations the original ghouls tackled over ten-years ago.
Video.title: Pilot Takes Flight

Video.summary: It’s a hectic day at the Graveyard. Dave jumps from car to car, installing and assembling what he can, Will struggles to keep focused on one project at a time, and Mark makes progress on his A100 build with the hopes of revealing at SEMA 2018!
Video.title: Surveying The Will To Work

Video.summary: Nick Rutter shows you how to remove bugs, polish exhaust tips and safetly remove dust
Video.title: Dust, Bugs and More

Video.summary: Nick Rutter shows you the process of applying a coating from claying, polishing, and maintenance
Video.title: Coating Your Car

Video.summary: Back to work giving our corvette a little extra horsepower.
Video.title: 2004 Corvette Upgrades

Video.summary: With a rough running Impala in the shop, the guys check out the MAF sensor.
Video.title: Air Flow System Diagnostics

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan give a Saturn a once over before it gets donated to Wheels for Hope.
Video.title: Engine Cooling

Video.summary: Kevin and Bryan say goodbye to the Federated Corvette project and give a lucky Vette owner a new performance clutch.
Video.title: 2004 Corvette Completion

Video.summary: A 67 Mustang Road Racer has a date with the Boss. A new Ford Racing “powerplant”.
Video.title: 1967 Mustang Road Racer

Video.summary: Bryan shows you why skipping the simple step of changing your brake hardware can be a noisy mistake.
Video.title: Silence the Squeal

Video.summary: Kevin takes a trip out to Magnaflow Exhaust to visit a couple of champion racers; Sam Hubinette and Casey Currie.
Video.title: Magnaflow Performance

Video.summary: We continue working on our 67 Mustang by putting in a complete fuel system.
Video.title: Fuel System

Video.summary: Horsepower and million-dollar sticker shock, from two and four wheels, dominate this edition of C & O.
Video.title: The Fastest Man on Two Wheels

Image.alt: The Fastest Man on Two Wheels
The Fastest Man on Two Wheels
The Fastest Man on Two Wheels

Video.summary: A need for speed in a Sleepy Georgia town has engineers pushing the boundaries to exceed 3000 horsepower.
Video.title: Power Play: Proline's Search for 3000+ HP

Image.alt: Power Play: Proline's Search for 3000+ HP
Power Play: Proline's Search for 3000+ HP
Power Play: Proline's Search for 3000+ HP

Video.summary: Turn of the century cars?with wooden wheels?at 85mph?oh my!
Video.title: Turn of the Century Cars

Video.summary: Urban Outlaw and designer Magnus Walker weighs in on his beloved Porsche and the legend of Hot Wheels.
Video.title: Hot Wheel's & an Urban Outlaw

Video.summary: Tracing the origins and solving the mystery of a controversial all-aluminum bodied 512 BBI Boxer Ferrari.
Video.title: Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari

Image.alt: Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari
Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari
Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari

Video.summary: Caffeine & Octane goes Turbo in the Twin Cities; Ferrari Drifter Federico Sceriffo finds a home in Atlanta.
Video.title: Twin City Turbos

Video.summary: Jaguar F-Type Project 7 crosses the Pond.
Video.title: 470MPH with Custom King George Poteet

Video.summary: Mustang Mayhem at the big show.
Video.title: Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA

Image.alt: Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA
Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA
Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA

Video.summary: Red carpet receptions for a Koenigsegg Regera.
Video.title: The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari

Image.alt: The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari
The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari
The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari

Video.summary: Covert cars that slipped into the U.S.
Video.title: Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions

Image.alt: Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions
Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions
Hollywood's Cars Come to Life at Picture Car Productions

Video.summary: "Go Fast Girl" Katherne Legge's Model A Racer.
Video.title: Rickey Gadson Stares Down a Steep Learning Curve at Rd. Atl

Image.alt: Rickey Gadson Stares Down a Steep Learning Curve at Rd. Atl
Rickey Gadson Stares Down a Steep Learning Curve at Rd. Atl
Rickey Gadson Stares Down a Steep Learning Curve at Rd. Atl

Video.summary: Mecum Auction's push for a $15,000,000 sale.
Video.title: A Sneak Peek at a Premier, Private Collection

Image.alt: A Sneak Peek at a Premier, Private Collection
A Sneak Peek at a Premier, Private Collection
A Sneak Peek at a Premier, Private Collection

Video.summary: Doubling down for cars and coffee.
Video.title: The World's Largest Monthly Car Show Goes Up for Sale to the Highest Bidder

Image.alt: The World's Largest Monthly Car Show Goes Up for Sale to the Highest Bidder
The World's Largest Monthly Car Show Goes Up for Sale to the Highest Bidder
The World's Largest Monthly Car Show Goes Up for Sale to the Highest Bidder

Video.summary: British Invasion through the decades.
Video.title: Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive

Image.alt: Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive
Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive
Landscaping a Home with a Nod to Automotive

Video.summary: Due diligence on custom builds and their quirky builders.
Video.title: The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains

Image.alt: The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains
The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains
The Fertile Car Grounds in the North Georgia Mountains

Video.summary: The Concourse d'lemons celebrates the oddball, mundane, & truly awful of the automotive world.
Video.title: Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island

Image.alt: Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island
Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island
Cars and Coffee Takes Center Stage on Amelia Island

Video.summary: Work ramps up on our 1970 Tribute Superbird and just when things couldn’t get more stressful, Mark has taken on a new project - a 1969 GTX owned by non other than Chris Jacobs, host of Overhaulin’. Not only does Chris want the car restored to its former glory, he wants it to be completed in time for SEMA 2017 - only sixty days away!
Video.title: Episode 1
